allgames.title: Cyberpunk 2077
allgames.description: Navigate the sprawling neon-lit streets of Night City as V, a mercenary outlaw chasing a one-of-a-kind implant that holds the key to immortality.

allgames.title: God of War
allgames.description: Kratos and his son Atreus journey through brutal Norse realms, facing gods and monsters in an epic tale of fatherhood and fate.

allgames.title: Marvel's Spider-Man
allgames.description: Swing through a stunning open-world New York City as Peter Parker, balancing the life of a superhero with the struggles of everyday existence.

allgames.title: GTA V
allgames.description: Three criminals risk everything in a series of daring heists across the sun-soaked city of Los Santos and its surrounding wilderness.

allgames.title: Elden Ring
allgames.description: Explore the shattered Lands Between, forging your own legend across a breathtaking open world filled with ancient mystery and brutal combat.

allgames.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare III
allgames.description: Drop into fast-paced multiplayer battles and a gripping campaign as elite soldiers face a global threat like never before.

allgames.title: EA Sports FC 24
allgames.description: The world's most popular football simulation returns with HyperMotionV technology, lifelike player movement, and the biggest club roster ever.

allgames.title: Assassin's Creed Valhalla
allgames.description: Lead a Viking clan from Norway to England, raiding settlements and building alliances in a rich open world steeped in Norse mythology.

allgames.title: Red Dead Redemption 2
allgames.description: Live the outlaw life as Arthur Morgan rides with the Van der Linde gang in the dying days of the American frontier.

allgames.title: Hogwarts Legacy
allgames.description: Attend Hogwarts in the 1800s, master spells, uncover a hidden secret, and shape your destiny in an immersive open-world wizarding adventure.

allgames.title: Fortnite
allgames.description: Drop onto the island, gather resources, build structures, and be the last one standing in this ever-evolving battle royale phenomenon.

allgames.title: PUBG: Battlegrounds
allgames.description: Parachute onto a massive map, scavenge for weapons and gear, and outlast 99 other players in the original battle royale experience.

allgames.title: Valorant
allgames.description: A 5v5 tactical shooter where precise gunplay meets unique agent abilities — strategy, teamwork, and split-second decisions determine victory.

allgames.title: Minecraft
allgames.description: Build anything imaginable in procedurally generated worlds, survive the night, explore vast caverns, and unleash your creativity without limits.

allgames.title: Apex Legends
allgames.description: Squad up with powerful Legends in a fast-paced battle royale featuring innovative movement mechanics and a diverse cast of characters.

allgames.title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
allgames.description: Play as Geralt of Rivia, a monster hunter tracking down his adopted daughter while navigating war-ravaged open-world kingdoms.

allgames.title: Far Cry 6
allgames.description: Join the guerrilla revolution in tropical Yara and overthrow the ruthless dictator Anton Castillo in a sprawling open-world shooter.

allgames.title: Battlefield 2042
allgames.description: Experience large-scale near-future warfare with 128-player matches, dynamic weather events, and game-changing specialist abilities.

allgames.title: Resident Evil 4 Remake
allgames.description: The legendary survival horror classic reimagined — rescue the President's daughter from a sinister cult in a heart-stopping third-person thriller.

allgames.title: Need for Speed Unbound
allgames.description: Race through the stylized streets of Lakeshore City, pull off daring stunts, and outsmart the police in a high-stakes underground racing circuit.

allgames.title: Starfield
allgames.description: Bethesda's space RPG lets you explore over 1,000 planets, build your own ship, and uncover the mysteries of humanity's final frontier.

allgames.title: Diablo IV
allgames.description: Descend into a dark gothic world teeming with demons. Plunder endless loot and battle Lilith across a vast shared open world.

allgames.title: Baldur's Gate 3
allgames.description: A masterfully crafted RPG set in the Forgotten Realms — forge alliances, make world-altering choices, and survive the darkness with friends or alone.

allgames.title: Hades
allgames.description: Battle out of the Underworld in this rogue-like dungeon crawler, forging powerful boons from the Olympian gods with every thrilling run.

allgames.title: Hollow Knight
allgames.description: Explore a vast underground kingdom of insects in this beautifully hand-drawn action-adventure filled with challenging combat and deep lore.

allgames.title: Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice
allgames.description: Master the shinobi sword in feudal Japan, facing terrifying bosses and uncovering a story of death, rebirth, and sacrifice.

allgames.title: Monster Hunter: World
allgames.description: Hunt breathtaking monsters across lush ecosystems, craft powerful gear from your kills, and take on legendary beasts with friends online.

allgames.title: Dark Souls III
allgames.description: Face relentless undead horrors and colossal bosses in this punishing action RPG set in the crumbling kingdom of Lothric — death is only the beginning.

allgames.title: Death Stranding
allgames.description: Reconnect a fractured America as Sam Porter Bridges, traversing hauntingly beautiful landscapes and delivering hope to isolated survivors.

allgames.title: The Last of Us Part I
allgames.description: A gripping post-apocalyptic journey of survival and love — Joel guides a young girl named Ellie across a brutal, infected United States.

allgames.title: Cyberpunk 2077: Phantom Liberty
allgames.description: A high-stakes spy thriller DLC set in Dogtown, where V must navigate between corporate spies and rogue militias.

allgames.title: Control
allgames.description: Wield supernatural powers inside the brutalist Federal Bureau of Control as Jesse Faden fights a paranormal invasion threatening reality itself.

allgames.title: Shadow of the Tomb Raider
allgames.description: Lara Croft races to stop a Mayan apocalypse she triggered, navigating deadly jungles, ancient tombs, and a ruthless secret organization.

allgames.title: Doom Eternal
allgames.description: Rip and tear through relentless demon hordes across Heaven, Hell, and Earth in a blistering, heavy-metal-fueled first-person shooter.

allgames.title: Returnal
allgames.description: Crash-land on an alien planet trapped in a time loop, mastering bullet-hell combat to uncover the terrifying truth behind the cycle.

allgames.title: Horizon Forbidden West
allgames.description: Aloy ventures into the dangerous Forbidden West, battling enormous machine creatures and uncovering a catastrophic threat to all life on Earth.

allgames.title: Ghost of Tsushima
allgames.description: Become the Ghost — a samurai who must forsake his code to protect Tsushima Island from a ruthless Mongol invasion in a stunning open world.

allgames.title: It Takes Two
allgames.description: An award-winning co-op platformer where a couple on the brink of divorce must work together through a wild genre-bending adventure.

allgames.title: Alan Wake 2
allgames.description: A psychological survival horror sequel where a troubled writer and an FBI agent are trapped in nightmarish worlds bleeding into reality.

allgames.title: Lies of P
allgames.description: A dark Soulslike inspired by Pinocchio — wield interchangeable weapons and navigate the grotesque Belle Époque city of Krat.

allgames.title: Sea of Stars
allgames.description: A love letter to classic JRPGs — two children of the solstice wield the power of sun and moon to defeat an evil alchemist's monstrous creations.

allgames.title: Dave the Diver
allgames.description: Dive into the Blue Hole by day and run a sushi restaurant by night — a charming mashup of adventure, RPG, and management sim.

allgames.title: Street Fighter 6
allgames.description: The iconic fighting franchise returns with a stunning Drive System, a rich single-player World Tour mode, and the deepest roster yet.

allgames.title: Armored Core VI
allgames.description: Pilot a fully customizable mech through intense high-speed combat missions across the resource-rich planet Rubicon 3.

allgames.title: Hi-Fi Rush
allgames.description: Rock out in this rhythm-action game where everything pulses to the beat — attack, dodge, and combo through a cel-shaded musical world.

allgames.title: Forza Horizon 5
allgames.description: Race across breathtaking open-world Mexico with over 500 cars, dynamic seasons that reshape the world, and endless multiplayer fun.

allgames.title: Helldivers 2
allgames.description: Drop onto hostile alien planets with up to four players, completing chaotic co-op missions to spread democracy across the galaxy.

allgames.title: Palworld
allgames.description: Capture mysterious creatures called Pals in a vast open world — put them to work, build bases, and fight to survive in this crafting sensation.

allgames.title: Tekken 8
allgames.description: The legendary fighting series reaches new heights with the new Heat System and the explosive conclusion of the Mishima saga.

allgames.title: Like a Dragon: Infinite Wealth
allgames.description: Ichiban Kasuga travels to Hawaii in this massive RPG sequel, teaming up with iconic series heroes in a heartfelt story of friendship and ambition.

allgames.title: Black Myth: Wukong
allgames.description: An action RPG inspired by Journey to the West, featuring intense combat, stunning visuals, and the legendary Monkey King in a dark fantasy world.
